title: citrus oleocarpa
intro: Citrus oleocarpa, also known as the wild orange, is a species of citrus tree native to Southeast Asia. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Citrus oleocarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against infections. Citrus oleocarpa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
